creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello Marc, 

I see a complete port in this PR, not a patch, but the Synopsis reads it is 
an update. What is your actual intention with this change? Do you want to 
update the older gnucash 1.x port or add this port as a new one? 

Regards, 
Gabor
